'''''Counter-Puncher''''' was a modified [[Imperial Customs Frigate]] commanded by [[Tor Skylow]]. Skylow persuaded the crew to rebel from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], taking the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] with them. She was used as a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] craft, raiding Imperial craft.
